name: Fitness Hub premium hardening
goal: Fix repo-side blockers that keep the app below premium readiness: dependency audit, auth error leakage, API validation, AI quality tests, UX loading polish, performance gates, and live Clerk role-matrix QA.
externalBlockers: Live Clerk account browser QA needs local Clerk test keys, database URL, and permission to create/update disposable codex-fh-* test users.
Strict production env preflight needs live Clerk, database, and Gemini env vars.
No production database writes or migrations are planned.

tasks.title: Validate plan and baseline
commands: node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-09-premium-hardening-execution-plan.json','utf8')); console.log('plan-json-ok')"
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server test -- tests/routes/ai.test.mjs
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm audit --audit-level high
tasks.pass: JSON parses, focused AI tests pass, audit target is captured.

tasks.title: Clear high dependency audit findings
commands: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm install
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm audit --audit-level high
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run build
tasks.pass: Install/build succeed and high audit findings are gone or narrowed to a documented upstream blocker.

tasks.title: Remove member debug leakage
commands: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/gymapp test
rg -n "JSON\\.stringify\\(errors|debugText|Stack Trace" artifacts/gymapp/app artifacts/gymapp/components artifacts/gymapp/lib
tasks.pass: Gymapp tests pass and grep finds no raw auth/debug leakage.

tasks.title: Harden mutating API validation
commands: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server test -- tests/routes/profiles.test.mjs tests/routes/workouts.test.mjs
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run typecheck
tasks.pass: Malformed payload tests return controlled 400s and typecheck exits 0.

tasks.title: Add AI quality regression fixtures
commands: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server test -- tests/routes/ai.test.mjs tests/routes/ai-quality.test.mjs
tasks.pass: Workout/food AI fixtures prove injury, duration, numeric, and schema guardrails.

tasks.title: Polish covered UX states
commands: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run test:e2e:ci
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run test:e2e:ui
tasks.pass: Admin/API and UI preview E2E pass with safer loading/error states.

tasks.title: Add performance stress gate
commands: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --filter @workspace/scripts test -- performance-budget-check.test.ts
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run build
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run stress:premium-hardening
tasks.pass: Budget tests, build, and stress script pass locally.

tasks.title: Add live Clerk role-matrix gate
commands: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server test -- tests/lib/clerk-role-matrix.test.mjs
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run qa:clerk-role-matrix
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run test:e2e:live-clerk
tasks.pass: Disposable owner, trainer, approved member, pending member, and revoked member personas are created in the Clerk test instance; API boundaries and member/admin browser ticket sign-in pass.

tasks.title: Final release gate and rerating
commands: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm -r --if-present run test
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run lint
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run build
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run verify:internal-beta
git diff --check
tasks.pass: Full tests, lint, build, internal beta gate, and diff check pass.
